subject: Happy Birthday, {{first_name}} — A Gift from Rani
preheader: Celebrate your birthday with something special from your Rani team.
htmlContent:
RANI

BEAUTY CLINIC

Cheers to You

Happy Birthday, {{first_name}}.

Birthdays are the perfect reminder to invest in yourself—and we want to help you celebrate. As a valued member of the Rani community, we have a special birthday gift waiting for you.

Your Birthday Gift

{{gift_amount}}

toward any treatment at Rani

Valid for 30 days from your birthday. Use code: BDAY-{{unique_code}}

Treat Yourself To:

♦

The Birthday Glow

A HydraFacial to make your birthday radiance official

♦

The Refresh

Botox touch-up to start your new year looking your best

♦

The Recharge

A vitamin injection to boost your energy for the celebrations

BOOK YOUR BIRTHDAY TREATMENT

Wishing you a beautiful birthday and a wonderful year ahead.

With warmth,
The Rani Team

Rani Beauty Clinic | Washington State

Unsubscribe
plainText:
HAPPY BIRTHDAY, {{first_name}}!

Birthdays are the perfect reminder to invest in yourself -- and we want to help you celebrate.

YOUR BIRTHDAY GIFT:
{{gift_amount}} toward any treatment at Rani
Valid for 30 days from your birthday.
Use code: BDAY-{{unique_code}}

TREAT YOURSELF TO:
- The Birthday Glow: A HydraFacial to make your birthday radiance official
- The Refresh: Botox touch-up to start your new year looking your best
- The Recharge: A vitamin injection to boost your energy for the celebrations

Book your birthday treatment: https://ranibeautyclinic.com/book

Wishing you a beautiful birthday and a wonderful year ahead.

With warmth,
The Rani Team

Rani Beauty Clinic | Washington State
Unsubscribe: {{unsubscribe_link}}
